title: Monetary Penalties on Four Cooperative Banks
description: RBI imposed penalties on four cooperative banks for regulatory non-compliance: Hutatma Sahakari Bank Ltd. (₹5 lakh), Shimoga District Co-operative Central Bank Ltd. (₹1 lakh), Chittoor District Co-operative Central Bank Ltd. (₹1 lakh), and Sultanpur District Co-operative Bank Ltd. (₹3 lakh). Penalties were levied following statutory inspections that identified deficiencies in compliance with RBI guidelines.
